---
title: deep-exit
description: "Keep process exits in main or init."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Keep process exits in main or init. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
func loadConfig() { if failed() { os.Exit(1) } }
```

## Good

```go
func run() error { return load() }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only deep-exit`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `warning`.
